query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, sorted by parcel area descending, and report both municipality and county.

2.description: get high risk quick-clay areas in Trondheim extent

3.description: get parcels in Trondheim larger than 5000 m²

5.description: deduplicate parcels by ID, keep max area

8.description: join with municipality and county info

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr ORDER BY skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
